    • explain

      public List<Explanation> explain(List<StringLocated> source, PreprocessingArtifact preprocessing)
      Explains, line by line, how the given preprocessed source is parsed.

      TeaVM counterpart of PSystemBuilder.explain(net.sourceforge.plantuml.nio.PathSystem, java.util.List<net.sourceforge.plantuml.text.StringLocated>, java.util.List<net.sourceforge.plantuml.text.StringLocated>, net.sourceforge.plantuml.Previous, net.sourceforge.plantuml.preproc.PreprocessingArtifact). It builds the UmlSource the same way as createDiagramFromPreprocessed(List, PreprocessingArtifact), finds the first factory that produces a valid diagram for the detected type, and delegates to its explain. pathSystem and previous are null here, as everywhere else in this builder.

      Parameters:
      source - the preprocessed source lines
      preprocessing - the preprocessing artifact
      Returns:
      the list of explanations, or null if no factory matched
